messages.author: eve_thompson
messages.text: On it. Mobile app v4.2 users unable to reach any API endpoints on iOS. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: iris_nakamura
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: eve_thompson
messages.text: Root cause: New gateway CORS policy whitelisted specific Origin headers. Mobile app v4.2 sen.... Rolling back.

messages.author: eve_thompson
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
